case_title: LASALLE HEIGHTS HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION VS. MINETTE NORRIS-COOPER et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $285.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT NORRIS-COOPER, MINETTE
